items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the availability of services at different locations. While the linked use case mentions the ability to book at different locations, it does not provide concrete evidence of how availability is managed or confirmed for each location. Therefore, without specific evidence to confirm or deny this requirement, the assessment remains inconclusive.
